## Summary

Brief description of the changes and their purpose.

**Closes:** #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore (no functional changes)

- 
- 
- 

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Smoke tested the extension in an Extension Development Host (`F5`)
- [ ] Verified complexity hover tooltips and codelens render properly

## Screenshots / Terminal Output

If applicable, add screenshots or terminal output demonstrating the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior has changed
- [ ] No personal information (emails, phones) in any files
